_comment: Hand-curated events that the upstream organizations don't publish on their own calendars.
Edit this file, commit, and push — GitHub Actions will pick up the change on the next refresh.
starts_at         required, ISO local datetime: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM (no timezone — see `timezone`)
duration_minutes  optional, used to compute end time
Monthly on the Nth weekday (1TU = first Tuesday, 2WE = second Wednesday, -1FR = last Friday):
Stop conditions: `until` (inclusive end date) or `count` (max occurrences). Without either,
the series expands for ~365 days from now.

events.location: MeadowView Conference Resort & Convention Center, Kingsport, TN
events.description: Monthly Kingsport Chamber breakfast featuring local and regional speakers.
Informal weekly coffee meetup for founders and operators in the Tri-Cities region.
